name: Star Trek RPG
description:
Welcome to the universe of Star Trek!

What will you be in this universe? A member of Starfleet? A Klingon warrior? A Romulan spy? Will you be a captain or an ensign trying to rise in the ranks?

What era do you live in? Will you explore the galaxy during the time of Pike and Kirk? Will you live through the events alongside Picard, Sisko, or Janeway? Or perhaps you'll go where no one has gone before in the post-Nemesis era.

Choose your destiny with honor and logic.

Live long and prosper 🖖
creator: Mago de Hojalata
